name: American Airlines Group Inc.
summary: American Airlines Group Inc. (AAG) is a major U.S. airline holding company whose wholly-owned subsidiary, American Airlines, Inc., operates mainline passenger air transportation services. The company provides domestic and international air travel, with operations divided between mainline (American Airlines) and regional services. AAG files consolidated financial reports encompassing all subsidiaries under its corporate umbrella.

products.name: Mainline Air Transportation
products.description: Passenger airline services operated directly by American Airlines, Inc., excluding regional operations.

products.name: Regional Air Transportation
products.description: Regional airline operations conducted under the AAG consolidated entity, separate from mainline services.
